text: O galaleditse botlhe ba ba atlileng taletso ya bone a supa fa ba WIBA ba arogane le bomme maele a go itshimolodisetsa dikgwebo tsa sennelaruri tse di ka tlhamelang ba bangwe mebereko fa ba lephata la bong bone ba ba tsibositse ka go fema dikgang tsa kgokgontsho ya bong le gone go ikemela ka dinao ka go itirela.
O tsweletse a re bomaitseanepe ba madi le bone ba ne ba ruta thata ka dikgang tsa madi di akaretsa tiriso e e lolameng ya madi le gone go a boloka.

text: Gape o tlhalositse gore ba setse ba pega baji bareki kwa mabentleleng, tiro e a reng e ka bo e dirwa ke badipalamo tsa setshaba.
O tlhalositse fa ba itemogetse fa batsadi bangwe ba rotloetsa bagwebi ba, ka go batla ditirelo tsa go isa bana ba bone kwa dikoleng.
A re go dira jalo go amile dikgwebo tsa bone, mme gape o gakolotse gore dipalamo tsa setshaba (school bus) ke tsone diletlelelwang go go pega bana ba dikole.

O supile fa a dumela gore batsadi bangwe ba sena kitso ya tsamaiso ya dipalamo tse di pegang ban aba dikole go tswa malwapeng, mme a re go maleba gore dikomiti jaaka tsa ya ipabalelo tseleng, le lephata la dipalamo di tlhagafalela go rutuntsha setshaba ka tsa dipalamo le tshireletsego mo go diriseng ditirelo tsa dipalamo tsa setshaba
Rre Ramotoroko o gateletse gore koloi nngwe le nngwe e e tsenang mo kgwebong ya go pega setchaba, e tshwanetse ya tlhatlhobiwa, e nne le teseletso ya go tsamayang mo tseleng, le go pega setshaba.
label: PERSON

text: “Fa o sena diteseletso tse, o bo o tsenelela kgwebo ya go kgweetsa setshaba, re dumela gore o kgoreletsa ba ba tshwanenetseng go gweba ka fa molaong,” ga tlhalosa Ramotoroko. Mme a re go le gantsi, ba kgona go dira maiteko a go lwantsha seemo se le ba sepodisi le ba lephata la dipalamo, mme a re sebe sa phiri ke tlhaelo ya didirisiwa le bodiredi jwa maphata go leka go lwantsha seemo se tsatsi le letsatsi.

Mokgweetsi wa dikhombi tsa Kanye-Moshupa, Rre Monkgwe Monkgwe o ntshitse matshwenyego a gore batho ba ba pegang bapalami mo dibaseng le mo dikoloing tse di senang teseletso ba borai mo kgwebong eo, ka jaana ba rekisetsa beng ba dikoloi tse di senang teseletso ya go pega setshaba bapagami.

Botswana Society for the Deaf e  dira botsalano le badirelapuso le makalana a a ikemetseng le go ruta  puo ya ba-tlhoka kutlo, maikaelelo e le go akaretsa ba-tlhoka kutlo.
label: ORG

text: Se se builwe ke mogolwane  wa Botswana Society for the Deaf, Mme Orapeleng Mokgosi ka letsatsi la mafatsfatshe la ba-tlhoka kutlo bosheng kwa Letlhakeng.  Mme Mokgosi a re mo-na-le-bogole le ene fela jalo o na le ditshwanelo.
label: PERSON
LOC

text: O tlhalositse seemo sa go tlhoka kutlo se ka se fetoge, ka jalo setshaba se tshwanetse se ba amogele ka fa ba ntse ka teng le go ithuta puo ya bone ya diatla. A re go itse puo ya diatla go tlaa thusa gore ba-tlhoka kutlo ba thusiwe sentle ka jalo ba kgone go akola mananeo le ditirelo tse dingwe tsa puso jaaka mongwe le mongwe.

Mme Mokgosi a re go tlhoka go itse puo ya diatla ke go rontsha ba-tlhoka kutlo tshwanelo ya bone, a supa fa ba tshwanetse go bona ditlamelo tsotlhe le tsa botsogo tota ntle le kgoreletsego a supa fa go ka ba itumedisa go bona motlhoka kutlo a thusiwa ntle le thuso ya moranodi.

Mopalamente wa Letlhakeng, Brigadier Domcaza Mokgwathi, a re go le gantsi ba-tlhoka kutlo ba amiwa thata ke lehuma kgotsa kgethololo, ka ba bua puo e sa tlhaloganngweng ke bontsi ka jalo ba kgoreletsege go bona metswedi ya go itshetsa.
label: LOC
PERSON

text: Ka jalo, Brigadier Mokgwathi a re puso le ba-na-le-seabe botlhe ba tshwanetse go itsolopanya gore ba-tlhoka kutlo le ba-na-le-bogole botlhe ka kakaretso ba bona ditlamelo le mananeo a a ka thusang go tokafatsa matshelo a bone. A re tumalano ya mafatshe ya ditshwanelo tsa ba-na-le-bogole e gatelela botlhokwa jwa puo ya diatla, ka jalo tsamaiso ya thuto e tshwanetse ya akaretsa botlhe.

Brigadier Mokgwathi a re puso e rekegela ditshwanelo le matshelo a batho ka kakaretso, ka jalo maiteko a tsweletse ka go dira go tokafatsa seemo sa ba ba lebegang ba saletse morago kana ba beilweng ka fa mahuring go akaretsa ba-tlhoka kutlo. O ba file tsholofelo ya gore puso e tsweletse ka go lemoga pharologanyo mo matshelong a batho, maikaelelo e le gore botlhe ba tshwarwe ka go lekalekana.
label: PERSON
ORG

text: Brigadier Mokgwathi a re go kokoana jalo, ga se fela go ipelela letsatsi leo, ke go sedimosa tse di tlhokwang ke batlhoka kutlo le maiteko a a dirwang go ba thusa le go bua ka ditshwanelo tsa bone le go tlhomamisa gore di a diragadiwa.
A re dilelo tsa bone ga se tsa batho ba iphetlhela puso ka gole boamaruri gore ba ntse ba itlhokomolositswe, mme seo se tsisa dikakanyo tsa gore ga se batho ba sepe mo setshabeng.

A re matshwenyego a magolo a ba-tlhoka kutlo ke gore melaetsa ga e goroge ka nako kwa go bone, ka puo ya bone ya go dirisa diatla e sa tlhaloganngwe ke bontsi, ka jalo gonne thata gore ba thusiwe sentle le gone ka nako.

Le fa go ntse jalo, mekgatlho e e ikemetseng e tsweletse ka go dira maiteko a gore setshaba le botlhe ba ba romilweng go isa ditirelo kwa setshabeng, ba itse fa ba direla tshaba e farologanyeng ka puo, jaak gona le ba-tlhoka kutlo ba ba dirisang puo ya diatla. Letsatsi leo, le ne le tshwerwe ka setlhogo se se reng: Ga Gona Ditshwanelo tsa Setho Ntle le Puo ya Diatla.”

PERSON

text: Fa a ba kgwa dikgaba ka matlo a khansele a a sa dirisiweng, Mopalamente Mathoothe o kopile khansele ya Serowe go shafatsa matlo ao ba bo ba firisetsa batho e le nngwe ya go tsenya madi mo letloleng la khansele.
label: PERSON
ORG

text: O supile fa ba tshwenngwa ke matlakala a a latlhelwang gongwe le gongwe kwa melapong, ditsela tsa masimo le matlotla a kopa banni go nna seopo sengwe mo go somareleng  tikologo e ba nnang mo go yone go hema malwetse a a ka ba tlhagogelang. A re o batla gore gaufi le marekisetso ao kwa go nang le phatlha teng, go agiwe a masha morago ga go ngoka babeeletsi ba dikgwebo. text: Mopalamante wa kgaolo ya Mahalapye yo gape e leng Tona wa Ditlhaeletsano le Botlhami Rre David Tshere o kopile ba sepodisi go tshwaragana le bogogi jwa motse go lwantsha borukutlhi.
label: LOC
ORG
PERSON

text: Rre Tshere o buile jalo mo bokopanong jwa gagwe le bogogi jwa sepodisi kwa Mahalapye ka Laboraro. Rre Tshere a re o tshwengwa ke dikgang tsa borukutlhi jo boileng magoletsa jwa dipetelelo le tiriso botlhaswa ya bana ba ba kwa tlase ga dingwaga tse di lesome boferabobedi mo go tsa tlhakanelo dikobo.
label: ORG
LOC
DATE

text: A re dikgang tse dingwe tse di tshwenyang thata mo kgaolong ya Mahalapye ke tsa dipolaano. O kopile mapodisi go ruta setshaba ka molato wa go tlhakanelo dikobo le ngwana wa dingwaga tse di kwa tlase ga mmogo le kotlhao ya one.
label: LOC

text: Rre Tshere o supile fa marekisetso a bojalwa a a bulwang gare ga masigo a gakatsa borukutlhi, a kopa gore diemelwe ka dinao. A re Mahalapye o itsege ka borukutlhi a supa fa seemo se, se diga seriti sa motse oo. O ne gape a ba kopa gore ba emele kgang ya ditagi ka dinao, segolo bogolo katse (Cat) e utlwalelwang kwa dikoleng.
label: PERSON

text: Tona Tshere o supile letshwenyego la dikara tsa ditonki tse di tsamayang gare ga bosigo di rwele dithoto le diteraka tse di rwalang motlhaba tse le tsone di tsamayang bosigo. Rre Tshere a re tshwaragano ya bogogi jwa motse le ba sepodisi e botlhokwa ka e ka hema borukutlhi.
label: PERSON

text: Mogolwane wa Mapodisi a kgaolo ya District No 16, Senior Superintendent Nicolas Kadiatla, a re 2024 ba fokoditse borukutlhi ka 19.8 per cent go feta seelo se se beilweng sa 5 per cent. Rre Kadiatla a re kgaolo ya District No 16 e okametse metse e le masome a mane le bobedi, dipolasi le meraka, tsela ya A1 gotswa Masama goema ka Radisele, diofisi tsa sepodisi di le thataro le makalana a sepodisi a le masome a mabedi le borataro. Rre Kadiatla a re ba itemogela tlhaelo ya boroko jwa bodiredi, a tlhalosa fa letlhoko la boroko le baka tlhaelo ya mapodisi.
label: LOC
PERSON
DATE
LOC

text: A re kgolo ya melato ya batho ba ba tlhakanelang dikobo le bana ba dingwaga tse di kwa tlase ga lesome le boferabobedi e a tshwenya, a supa fa ba tswelela ba itemogela ditagi tse di fetang kwa kgaolong ya Mahalapye di tsena ka dipolasi tse di fa thoko ga noka di tswa kwa mafatsheng a mangwe. A re ba na le mananeo a tshwaragano ya mapodisi le setshaba le mananeo a go tsamaya ba phuruphutsha le dikganedi tsa tsela tse a reng di fokotsa borukutlhi.

text: Mokhanselara wa Kgaolo ya Madiba, Rre Mokgweetsi Moisiraela, a re go loma mapodisi tsebe ga gona molemo ope ka jaana mapodisi mangwe ba dirisanya le dirukutlhi. Rre Moisiraela a re batho ba dikara tsa ditonki tse di tsamayang masigo ba utswa dipudi le dikoko.

PERSON

text: Fa mokhanselara yo o  itlhophetsweng, Mme Kesegofetse Magapa, a akgotse mapodisi a re ba dira tiro e ntle ya go lwantsha borukutlhi. Mme Magapa o ne a lebogela lekalana le le haphegileng la tshireletso ya bana a tlhalosa fa le tlaa tokafatsa dikgang tsa bana. A re maikaelelo a bokopano jo, ke go bopa tshwaragano ya bogogi jwa kgaolo le sepodisi go lwantsha borukutlhi.

text: Lenaneo la Rea-Nyalana le tsweletse ka go tshwaragana batho baba nnang mmogo ba sa nyalana.
label: MISC

text: Ba lenaneo la Rea-Nyalana ba ne ba nyadisa batho bale masome a mabedi le botlhano ba metse ya Mookane, Palaroad le Makwate kwa Mookane ka Labobedi.
label: ORG
LOC
LOC
LOC
DATE

text: Fa a bua kwa moletlong, Mothusa Tona wa Boatlhodi le Popo Sesha ya Magolegwa, Rre Augustine Nyatanga o supile fa lenaneo la Re-A- Nyalana le dira tiro e e botlhokwa ya go rotloetsa batho ba ba nnang mmogo ba sa nyalana go tsena mo nyalong ka fa molaong.
label: ORG
PERSON

text: Rre Nyatanga a re lenyalo la lenaneo la Re-A-Nyalana ke lenyalo tota le go iwang kwa ga molaodi gona le basupi le setlankana. A re go nyalana kafa molaong ke go thaya tshimologo ya bo kamoso jo bo siameng jwa bana.
label: MISC

text: Rre Nyatanga o rotloeditse banyalani gore ba tshedisane sentle, ka lorato a tlhalosa gore tirisanyo mmogo e botlhokwa e aga lelwapa. A re go botlhokwa gore se motho a se simololang go siame a netefatse gore o se fetsa jaaka a ikanne gore ba tlaa kgaogangwa ke loso.
label: MISC

text: Rre Nyatanga a re maikano a bone e ne aa tswang mo boteng jwa pelo, a tlhalosa gape gore baitse gore ke batho bale babedi ba ba sa tshwaneng mme ka jalo ba tlaa farologana ka dilo tse dingwe.

O akgotse ba lenaneo la Rea -Nyalana tiro e ntle e ba e dirang ya go aga malwapa ka semolao. A re lefatshe leno le kaiwa le na le batho ba ba tletseng shakgalo ee supiwang ke kgokgontsho ee felelang e baka dipolaano.
O ba kopile gore ba seka ba amega mo ditiragalong tsa kgokgontsho a ba rotloetsa borre gore fa ba na le diemo kwa malwapeng ba kope thuso ko mapodising, bo kgosi le baruti.
Mogolwane wa lenaneo la Rea- Nyalana Mme Motshidisi Morwaagole a re ba ne ba bopa lenaneo le ka ba ne ba lemoga fa batho ba jewa ntsoma fa yo mongwe a tlhokafetse ba sa nyalana.
label: PERSON

text: Mme Morwaagole a re lenaneo ga lena dipoelo a tlhalosa gore tiro ya lone ke go thusa go emisa kgokgontsho ga mmogo le hema kgogakgogano ya dithoto.
label: PERSON

text: Mme Morwaagole a re ba setse segofaditse banyalani bale 729 lefatshe leno ka bophara, ba bo ba thusa ba ba runtshiwang ditshwanelo tsa boswa bale 14 458. A re mo manyalong a 729 ao ga gona le le thubegileng.
A re pele ga ba nyalana ba ba direla di thuto-puisano go ba ruta gore fa ba saena ba bo baitsi gore ba dira eng. Mme Morwaagole a re ba baruta ka lenaneo la go aba boswa ba santse ba tshela.
A re ba dirisana le offisi ya ga molaodi, ya Omang le Master’s Office.
label: ORG
ORG

text: Tona wa Dikgaolo le Ngwao, Rre Ketlhalefile Motshegwa o solofeditse banni ba Lesenepole gore e tlaare mo sebakeng sa kgwedi a boele kwa go bone go ba rolela tshwetso e e tserweng mabapi le kgang ya bone.
label: ORG
PERSON

text: Se se tla morago ga gore Rre Motshegwa a etele motse oo ka Mosupologo go reetsa kgang ya bangwe ba motse ba ba supileng fa e le ba Matolwane mme ba kopa gore ba kgaoganngwe le ba Lesenepole gore ba ikemele.
label: DATE

text: Ka jalo Rre Motshegwa o ne a re o ya go lebelela tse banni ka go farologana ba se buileng kana ba di ntshitseng le mekwalo e e tlaa kwalwang mme a tsee tshwetso e e maleba.
A re tshwetso e e tlaa tsewang ga go ree gore e tlaa itumedisa botlhe mme banni ba tshwanetse ba amogele gore mongwe le mongwe o ne a neelwa sebaka sa go bua ka kgololesego.
O ne a gakolola banni go kwala ditso tsa motse wa bone gore di seka tsa nyelela le gore ba itse gore bogosi bo tlhomagana jang le melelwane ya metse e tsamaya jang.
Rre Motshegwa o supile fa a tshwentswe ke dikgang tse di amanang le bogosi le maina a motse a supa fa se se kgona go busetsa ditlhabololo kwa morago.
E ne e rile go le pele mongwe wa dibui kwa phuthegong eo,
Rre Gareaitse Spark o ne a supa fa ba kopa puso go ba kgaoganya le Lesenepole mme ba bitswe Matolwane.
label: PERSON

text: O ne a re ba bitswa Lesenepole ntswa e se leina la bone ka jalo ga go ba itumedise gore ba bitswe ka leina le eseng la bone.
A re Lesenepole ke rraabone mogolo mme go le pele ba ne ba bitswa Matolwane mme ga tshwarwa ditlhopho tsa leina la motse mme la fetoga go nna Lesenepole.
O tlhalositse fa  ditso tsa bone di a nyelela ka ba beilwe ka fa tlase ga Lesenepole ntswa go sa tshwanela gore go nne jalo.

A re ba Lesenepole ga ba ba rerise sentle fa go tla mo dikgannyeng tse di farologaneng tsa motse e bile ba ikgagapeletse kgotla e go kabong gotwe ba e kopanetse mo go felelang dikgosi tsa bone di e fapaanela bogosi jwa teng.
Rre Spark a re fa go tsena ditlhopho tsa VDC ba Lesenepole ka ba le palo e ntsi go tsena bone ka palo e ntsi e bo e nna bone ba laolang.
label: ORG

text: A re ba batla go akola lefatshe la bone mme motse o o ka kgaolwa fela jaaka wa kgagodi le Diloro.
Rre Spark a re go na le molelwane e bile ditlhabololo jaaka kgotla, sekole le kokelwana di fa gare ga Matolwane le Lesenepole.

Rre Mogomotsi Johannes o ne a gatelela mafoko a ga Rre Spark mme a supa fa morafe wa Matolwane o batla go kgaoganngwa le wa Lesenepole ka e bile ba itse le melelwane ya dikgotla tsa bone gore e tsamaya jang le one mabitla a bone a kgaogane.
label: PERSON

text: Ntswa bangwe ba ne ba supa fa ba batla go kgaoganngwa le ba Lesenepole, bangwe ba ne ba supa fa go sa tlhokafale gore ba kgaoganngwe mme tshwetso e sale e tserwe ke ditlhopho tsa motse tse di neng tsa dirwa ka ngwaga wa 2015 tsa felela leina la Lesenepole la fenya.
Rre Olebeletse Keitiretse o ne a kopa gore Tona Motshegwa a tlhotlhomise kgang e ka kelotlhoko a supa fa ba Matolwane ba ba fitlhetse mo thoteng eo.
label: PERSON

text: A re mo motseng wa bone ga gona molelwane ope o o leng teng le ba Matolwane ka jalo ga gona fa ba ka kgaoganyang teng.
Rre Ponatshego Banyatsi le ene o ne a gana kgang ya gore Matolwane a ikemele e nne motse.

text: Mo go tse dingwe dikgang tsa borukutlhi, Supt Kekgathetse a re ba tlhotlhomisa tiragalo e go thubilweng ofisi ya boipelego, mme ga utswiwa di laptop tse pedi ka Matlhatso, kwa kgotleng ya Tshosa kwa Letlhakeng.  Ga go ise go tshwarwe ope mabapi le tiragalo e.

text: Supt Kekgathetse a re ba begetswe gape tiragalo e mo go yone ntlo ya Setswana e neng ya jewa ke molelo kwa morakeng wa Dinonyane gone ka Matlhatso. A re dipelaelo ke gore ntlo eo, e tlhoseditswe ke rre mongwe wa dingwaga tse di masome a mane le bongwe, morago ga tlhatlharuane le moratiwa wa gagwe wa dingwaga tse di masome mararo le boferabongwe (39).

Mothusa Tautona, yo gape e leng mopalamente wa Gaborone Bonnington South, Rre Ndaba Gaolathe a re tiriso ya madi a setshaba ka kelelelo e botlhokwa e bile puso e tsaya ka tlhwaafalo go netefatsa gore madi a dirisiwa mo ditirong tsa lefatshe tse di maleba.
label: ORG
PERSON

text: Fa a buisa phuthego ya kgotla kwa Marulamatsi mo Gaborone ka Mosupologo, Rre Gaolathe  a re dilo tsa ntlha tse puso e itebagantseng le go di dira gore e kgone go tokafatsa itshololelo, ke go kaba diphatlha tsotlhe tse madi a setshaba a lemosegileng a senngwa ka teng.
label: LOC
DATE
PERSON

text: Ka jalo Rre Gaolathe a re puso e simolotse go netefatsa gore madi otlhe a a tswang go tshwanetse ga tlhalosega gore a ntshediwa eng le gore a ya go dirisiwa ka tsela e e ntseng jang, go itsa tshenyo e e tseneletseng ya madi.
label: PERSON

text: O supile fa maiteko a puso a go hema tshwenyetso setshaba le tiriso botlhaswa ya madi a setshaba a simolotse go ntsha maduo.
Rre Gaolathe o tlhalositse fa puso e ikemiseditse go tokafatsa seemo sa itsholelo gore e kgone go fetola matshelo a Batswana e sa lomeletse kgotsa e tlogela Motswana ope kwa ntle.
label: PERSON

text: E re le ntswa mo nakong ya gompieno lefatshe le lebanwe ke seemo se se sa iketlang sa itsholelo e e kwa tlase, Rre Gaolathe o supile fa a na le tsholofelo le tumelo gore lefatshe la Botswana le tsile go tswa mo seemong se le leng mo go sone ka go fetlha ditiro, go aga le go tokafatsa seemo sa botsogo le thuto.
label: PERSON
LOC

text: Boeteledipele jwa lefatshe le ka go farologana, bo ntse bo tsamaya le mafatshe go ngoka babeeletsi gore itsholeleo ya lefatsshe e kgone go simolola go fetlha ditiro tse di lekaneng.
A re maikaelelo a puso, ke go dira ka natla le ka bofefo jo bo kgonagalang go tokafatsa seemo sa itsholelo ka go baakanya ditsamaiso tsa lefatshe.

“Re eletsa gore re nne lefatshe le le direlang Batswana ka go lekana, le sa lomeletse ope e bile le sa tlogele ope kwa ntle. Ke gone kwa re yang teng, ka gore re tshwanetse gore re direle dilo mo pontsheng re le mmogo,” ga bua Rre Gaolathe.
label: PERSON

text: Maikaelelo magolo a puso, ke go tlhabolola mehama yotlhe ya itsholelo gore e kgone go kabakanya itsholelo gore e atlege ka go itsa go ikaega fela ka diteemane.
label: ORG

text: A re mo nakong ya gompieno, puso e lebanwe ke dikgwetlho di tshwana le go tokafatsa seemo sa botsogo, thuto, gammogo le go tlhabolola dikago, ditsela le diporo.

A re go maleba gore puso e tlhabolole mohama wa temo thuo, bojanala, ditsela le diporo gore dithoto tsa bagwebi ba ba mo Botswana le ba ba kwa ntle di kgone go fitlhelela mebaraka e e maleba go leka go fetlha itsholelo.
label: LOC

text: Mo godimo ga moo, Rre Gaolathe a re go maleba gape go patika puso gore e tlhwaafalele go tlhabolola seemo le serodumo sa dikhampane tse goromente a nang le seabe mo go tsone, jaaka Botswana Meat Commission, Botswana Vaccine Institute, Botswana Savings Bank, Botswana Building Society, magareng ga tse dingwe.

text: Kgakololo e ntshitswe bosheng ke mogolwane wa lephata le le rotloetsang botsogo, twantsho ya bolwetse jwa AIDS le malwetse a sa tshelanweng, Mme Gloria Rakgotla kwa tirong e e neng e rulagantswe go rotloetsa botsogo.
label: PERSON

text: Mme Rakgotla o tlhagisitse setshaba go tsibogela botsogo ka go dira sepe se se ka thusang go sidila mmele le tlhaloganyo.
label: PERSON

text: A re go tlhoka go itshidila mmele ke kgwetlho mo babereking ka bontsi bo tsaya nako e ntsi ba dira tiro e e sa ba gwetlheng go sidila mmele, selo se se tsisang borai jwa go tsenwa ke malwetse a a sa tshelanweng jaaka madi a matona, sukiri, monono o feteletseng le a a amanang le pelo.
A re lefelo la tiro le tshwanetse la tsibogela go ruta le go rotloetsa badiri go thibela malwetse a a sa tshelanweng.

Mme Rakgotla a re makalana ka bontsi ga ana tsamaiso ya go rotloetsa botsogo mo tirong ka jalo seo, se dire gore badiri ba se ka ba bona thuso e e tlhokegang jaaka go tlhatlhobiwa ke dingaka kgapetsa kgapetsa, go ikhutsa, go itshidila mmele kana go bona ditirelo tsa botsogo jwa tlhaloganyo.
Morutuntshi wa lekalana la APSA, Mme Nokuthula Martin a re botsogo ke karolo e e botlhokwa mo tirong, ka jalo go tshwanetse ga nna le nako ya go sekegela botsogo jwa babereki.
label: ORG
PERSON

text: Mme Martini a re go ka dirwa jalo ka go nna le lenaneo la go itshidila mmele kgotsa go rulaganya thuto ka botlhokwa jwa go ja dijo tse di itekanetseng.
A re go botlhokwa gore ofisi e nne le komiti ya boitekanelo, mafelo a boitapoloso le go dira melawana ya mo ofising e e rotloetsang go itshidila mmele le go laola maikutlo a babereki.
label: ORG

text: Mme Martin a re malwetse a a sa tshelanweng a na le seabe se segolo mo go oketsegeng ga dintsho mo lefatsheng ka bophara, ka jalo go tshwanetse ga tsewa dikgato tsa go a fedisaMapodisi a Lobatse a mo patlong ya monna mongwe wa motse wa Molapowabojang yo go belaesegang a timetse.

text: Moo potsolotsong le BOPA, mothusa mookamela mapodisi a Lobatse assistant superintendent Montsho Segokgo a re mapodisi a begetswe tiragalo e, ka kgwedi ya Phalane a le malatsi a le masome a mabedi le botlhano ke ba losika ba supa fa monna yoo wa dingwaga tse di masome a marataro le boferabobedi (68) a sa bonwe.

text: O ne a tlhalosa gore ba sepodisi ba ne ba ikgolaganya le banni ba Molapowabojang go bolotsa letsholo go batla monna yo a kaileng a ise a bonale go fitlha mo nakong eno.

O tlhalositse gore monna yoo ke motho yo o tshelang ka seemo sa tlhaloganyo ee sa iketlang(dementia) ka gore mo nakong e e fetileng, ba sepodisi ba kile ba begelwa fa a ne a timetse mme ba ne ba mmatla ba bo ba mmona mo nakong e khutshwane.
Ass. Superintendent Segokgo o tlhalositse gore o tshwenngwa ke gore mo nakong eno ba mmatlile sebaka se se leele mme le jaana monna yoo ga a ise a bonale.

text: Mothusa mookamela mapodisi a Lobatse, Rre Segokgo a re ba begetswe gore monna yoo o bonwe la bofelo a apere borokgwe jo bohibidu le sekipa se se botala jo bo gateletseng mme se kgwarilwe ka ditselana tse di mmala o mohibidu le mmala o o mosetlha e bile a rwele ditlhako tse dintsho.

text: A re e sale a tsena mo kgotleng ka 2004, o anywile go le go ntsi mo go Kgosi Dithapo ka a ne a sa ba kaele mo go tsa bogosi fela mme ane a ba gakolola gape ka tsa botshelo ka kakaretso.

text: Kgosi Munduu o lebogetse gape gore Kgosi Dithapo o ne a eteletse pele merafe ka go farologana mme a netefatsa gore botlhe ba nna le kemedi mo kgotleng.

text: Moemedi wa ba lelwapa, Rre Sesentle Madisa o boletse fa Kgosi Dithapo e le motho yo o ratang dilo tse di tlhamaletseng. A re o ne a rata gore dikgang tsa motse di buelwe kwa kgotleng gore morafe ka kakaretso o nne le seabe mo tlhabololong ya motse wa bone.

text: A re o dumela fa yoo otla tsayang mo go Kgosi Dithapo a tlaa tsweledisa tiro e ntle eo ya go bereka le morafe ka lorato le gone go tsweledisa fa a emeng teng.

text: O boletse fa Kgosi Dithapo e le mogaka ka jaana a tsene mo tirong ka nako ya fa go sena didirisiwa mme a bereka ka natla. “Re le bantsi re ithutile go le gontsi mo go ene ka e le motho yo o ratang go gakolola e bile a rata dilo tse dintle”.

Kgosi Ledimo le ene o boletse fa a ne a ila botlhoka tsebe lobaibai a tlatsa ka gore motse wa Sehithwa o ne o tumile ka setlhopha sa diganka mme kgosi hedisa maitsholo a o ka ponyo ya leitlhoBanni ba Maun le metse e e mabapi ba akgoletswe go tsaya botsogo jwa bone tsia ka go tlhatlhobela malwetse.

text: Letsholo leo, le le tshwarang ngwaga le ngwaga le ne le ngokile dingaka ga mmogo le bo mmantswitswidi ba tsa botsogo go tswa mo Maun le Gaborone ba ba neng ba ithaopetse go fa ditirelo tsa bone mahala.

text: Malwetsi a a neng a tlhatlhobela a ne a akaretsa bolwetsi jwa matlho, kankere, diphilo, sebete gammogo le madi a matona.

Rre Saleshando o ne a leboga banni go menagane a re monongwaga ba ne ba tsile ka dipalo palo go tsaya karolo mo letsholong la go itlhatlhoba, selo a reng sea  nametsa ka jaana ba tlaa itse diemo tsa bone go le nako mme ba tseye kgato.

text: A re dipatlisiso di supa gore mo Botswana, dintsho tse di diragalang di feta masome a mane mo lekgoleng (40 per cent) di bakiwa ke malwetse a a sa tshelwaneng a tlatsa ka gore se se ngomolang pelo ke gore batho ba le bantsi ga ba itse gore ba a lwala.
label: LOC

text: “Ke ka moo re boneng go tshwanela go rulaganya letsholo le go fa banni monyetla wa go itlhatlhoba gore ba tswe fa ba itse seemo sa bone sa botsogo mme ba ba amegileng ba tseye kgato nako e sale teng go thibela dintsho,’a tlatsa jalo.

Rre Saleshando o ne a gape a lebogela boithaopo jwa ba botsogo go bo bane ba tsaya karolo mo letsholong leo a tlatsa ka gore maikaelelo ke gore bao ba ba ka tlhokang go dira loaro le le botlana go tsewe maina a bone mme ba felele ba bone thuso e e maleba.
label: PERSON

text: O tsweletse a re bangwe ba dingaka ba ithaopile go thusa ntle le dituelo. O ne a ntsha sekao ka go latlhegelwa ke pono a supa fa loaro lwa go busetsa pono lo sa tseye nako e telele.

Rre Saleshando o boletse fa go ya pele ba tlaa sekaseka gore a ba ka seke ba oketse malatsi gore letsholo leo le tseye malatsi a mabedi ka jaana la monongwaga le ngokile matshwititshwiti a tlatsa ka gore bangwe ba dingaka ba supile kgatlhego go tsaya karolo ngwaga o o tlang.
label: PERSON

text: Mongwe  wa ba botsogo, Mme Cinderalla Gaebowe yo a lebaganeng le goisa ditlamelo kwa bathong  le ene o supile fa ba itumeletse tshologelo ya batho a tlatsa ka gore seo se ba nametsa pelo ka e le sekao sa gore Batswana ba nyoretse dithuso tsa botsogo.
label: PERSON

text: A re kwa bofelong jwa letsholo ba batla gore Batswana ba nne le botsogo jo bo nonofileng, ba itse gore ba ka tsela sentle, ba ka thibela jang malwetse a ka laolesegang jaaka sukiri le madi a matona.

Mongwe wa banni e bile e le monana, Mme Ntshang Kamba o ne a leboga ofisi ya ga mopalemente go bo e rulagantse letsholo la go itlhatlhoba a supa fa bontsi jwa banana ba sa bereke mme ba felele ba gatelelwa ke maikutlo  kgabagare ba felela ba gomagomediwa ke malwetse a masesenyane. O tsweletse a re ditlamelo dingwe tse ba di akolang mo letsholong leo ga diyo mo dikokwelwaneng ka bontsi.Molemi wa masimo a Beyanga kwa Tutume, Mme Chikadzi Rodger a re fa go tla mananeo ape a balemisi ba reng a siametse temo, o nna tsebe ntlha go reetsa le go kopa dikgakololo mo go bone mme a lekeletse.
label: PERSON
LOC
PERSON

text: Mo potsolotsong le BOPA, Mme Rodger wa dingwaga tse di masome marataro le boraro a re ene le balemi ba bangwe ba le masome mararo ba tsene mo dithutong tsa temo dikgwedi tse di fetileng go ipaakanyetsa temo.

PERSON

text: A re dithuto tseo, di ne di rulagantswe ke ba Mayombo Muphane ka fa tlase ga lekalana la Farmers Field School(FFS).

text: Maikaelelo a dithuto tseo e ne e le go ba suga le go fa balemi bao maele a go ntsha mhero wa muthwa, go lema nawa ya lablab le lebelebele le gore ba ka thiba jang mesele e e epegileng mo masimong ka ntlha ya dipula.

Mme Rodger a re balemi ba ba tseneng dithuto tseo, ba ya go seegela fa thoko, diekere tse pedi tse ba yang go diragatsa se ba se rutilweng, fa maiteko a bone a ka tswa tema,e tlaa nna bone ba ba rutang balemi bangwe.
label: PERSON

text: A re lenaneo leo, le lemogile fa balemi ba sa kgone go ntsha dijo tse di lekaneng ka jalo le ba thusa go oketsa thobo. Ba lenaneo leo la FFS ba lemogile fa molemi a kgona go tswa ka dikgetsi tse di fa tlase ga lesome mo ekereng e go solofetsweng e ka bo e ntshitse masome mabedi kana go feta.
label: ORG

text: O tsweletse a re gape dithuto tseo ke go fedisa kana go tlogedisa balemi mokgwa wa go ikaega ka go ya go bereka kwa Pandamatenga mme ba leme mo masimong a bone.

A re masimo a fetogile dikgwa, batho fa ba re ba lemile ba lema ekere fela, fa bangwe ba lema mme ba phuaganye masimo a bone. O ne a leboga balemi ba masimo a Beyanga, a re ba santse ba lema thata ka dipalo tse di kwa godimo.

text: O tlhalosa fa bangwe ba masika ba ba tlang mabapi le ba ga bone ba ba tlhokafetseng mme ba ne ba bereka kwa meepong eo, ba tla ba sa tshola bosupi jwa gore moswi o tlhokafetse ka mabaka a bolwetsi bo fe,  ntswa ele bosupi jo bo tlhokegang gore ba thusiwe.
A supa jalo gore ba itemogetse gore go na le ba ba fetotseng maina, mme jaanong go tsaya lobaka go rurifatsa gore a ke nnete ke bone.

Mabapi le dikatso, Rre Shale a re ba go tlaa fitlhelwang ba ne ba amega mo mafatlheng kana ba tlhokafala ka mabaka a tsa pereko mo meepong eo ya gauta ba tlaa bona madi a a fa gare ga P84 000 le P200 000 mme selekanyo sa madi se motho a tlaa se bonang se tlaa laolwa ke ditshekatsheko tse di tlaa dirwang.

text: O ne a tlhalosa gore o ne a tlhokomelwa kwa kokelong ya moepo oo sebaka sa ngwaga mme ya re morago ga seo a ntshiwa kwa tlase a berekela kwa ntle.

A kaya jalo gore o lela selelo sa ga ragele ka gore dikarata tsa gagwe tse di supang gore o ne a tsaya dipilisi tsa TB di latlhegile ka go le sebaka a tlogetse kwa moepong oo. A re dilo di fetogile le one moepo oo o sale o tswetswe jaanong go sena kwa a ka bonang dipampiri teng.

Rre Buru Molefe le ene o tlhalositse gore o ne a berekela ka fa tlase ga lefatshe kwa meepong ya gauta kwa Afrika Borwa e le mmaakanyi wa didirisiwa go simolola ka ngwaga wa 1975 go fitlhelela ka ngwaga wa 1998 mme jaanong le ene a tsile go sekasekwa mafatlha go bona gore a ga a a amega le gore a bone dikatso fa a ka fitlhelwa a babaletswe.

text: Rre Baoki yo a itsegeng ka leina la Buju Bantii mo go tsa bodiragatsi, a re moribo wa katara ya setso o farologanye thata le wa diletso tse dingwe, ka jalo go le botlhokwa go re o somarelwe go o itsa go nyelela.

text: A re le fa dingwaga di setse di ile o tlaa itshoka fela go fitlhela a kgotsofalela kanamo ya kitso le tiriso ya katara ya setso mo setshabeng sa lefatshe leno, segolo jang mo dikokomaneng tse di tswang kwa tlase.

Buju Bantii, yo o dingwaga di 57 a re go botlhokwa go sireletsa meopelo ya setso ga mmogo le didirisiwa tsa setso tsa bodiragatsi go tlhomamisa gore bodiragatsi jwa lefatshe leno bo nna le motlhala o o papametseng.

Fa a bua ka loeto la gagwe mo go tsa bodiragatsi, Buju Bantii a re o sale a ithuta go letsa katara ya setso a sale mmotlana, e le kitso e a neng a e anywa mo go ba lapa la gagabo ka rraagwe Rre Ntana Basiamang le batsalwa-le-ene ba ne ba le mo mererong ya bodiragatsi.

text: Buju Bantii, yo e leng sealogane sa sekolo sa temo-thuo sa Botswana University of Agriculture and Natural Resources (BUAN), a re o kile a nna leloko la setlhopha sa kwa Molepolole se se ne neng se itsege ka leina la Sloi Band, kwa a neng a kopana le badiragatsi ba akaretsa Pheko ‘Zangwana’ Mabolai, Mogorosi ‘Makholoskop’ Bashoma le Gosiame ‘Kolobe’ Setlhodi.

text: Fa a santse a le kwa Sloi Band, Buju Bantii a re o ne a golola ditlhamo di le nne ebong Ba ka dira, Thulathula, Sa Mosimanyana, le Ntuela. A re le ntswa Sloi Band e ne ya phutlhama o ne a se ka a nyema moko mme o ne a tswelela a sala toro ya gagwe morago go fitlhela a golola tlhamo ya Obama.

text: Fa a tlhalosa ka Obama, a re tlhamo e, e a sa tswang go e golola, ebile e le setlhogo sa kgatiso e rotloetsa batho go ikanya Modimo go ba tshegetsa mo ditlalelong tsa botshelo. A re ka pina ya Dirang dijo o gwetlha batho go boela kwa botshelong jwa Setswana jwa go itirela dijo segolo jang mo dinakong tseno tse itsholela e gogobang mo seretseng.

Buju Bantii o ne a wetsa ka go ikuela mo pusong gore fa e ntse e thusa badiragatsi e tle kwa go bone go utlwa sentle gore ba tlhokana le dithuso tsa mofuta mang, a re go dira jalo go ka thusa gore maiteko a puso a sologele badiragatsi mosola.Mekgatlho ya bomme e na bokgoni jwa go tsisa diphetogo mo matshelong a batho ga mmogo le mo lefatsheng ka bophara.
Se, se builwe ke mogwebi yo ebileng ele ngwana wa Tonota, Rre Spencer Mogapi kwa bokopanong jwa go kokoanya madi jo bo neng bo rulagantswe ke mokgatlho wa Lentswe la Bomme kwa Tonota ka Labobedi.

text: A re ka mangwe maitlamo a mokgatlho wa Lentswe la Bomme ele go thusa ba ba tlhokileng lesego, seo se botlhokwa fela thata ka jaana goromente ga a sa tlhole a kgona, mme thuso tsa bone di le maleba. Rre Mogapi a re bokamoso jwa lefatshe leno bo mo mekgatlhong e tshwana e.

text: A re dipalo tse di gomagometsa banana ba ba nang le mogare ka dipalo tse di magareng ga masome mane le masome matlhano setlha sengwe le sengwe.
O tsweletse ka go tlhalosa fa se se raya gore ka ngwaga kgaolo e kwadisa dipalo di ka tshwara selekanyo sa makgolo a mabedi e le banana ba ba amilweng ke mogare.
“Se ga se matshwenyego a a kalo le fa ditsholofelo tsa rona e le gore go seka ga nna le ba ba tsenwang ke mogare gotlhelele”,  a tlhalosa.
O supile fa dipalo tsa mogare o mosha di lemotshega segolo thata mo bananeng, a re bomme go supega e le bone ba ba itlhatlhobang kgapetsa kgapetsa ka dipalo tse di kwa godimo.

A re seemo se se tshwenyang ka go itlhatlhobela mogare ke gore, balekane ba bone ba bo rre, ba itlhatlhoba ka dipalo tse di kwa tlase ka jalo sebe sa phiri e nna gore dipalo tsa bone di supa go amiwa ke mogare o mosha go le kwa godimo go fetisa bomme.

O sedimositse fa go tshegetsa letsatsi le go tlaa tswela kgaolo molemo ka jaana go na le thulaganyo ya go fitlhelela batho kwa metseng e e mabapi e tshwana le Lotlhakane East, Lorolwane le Gasista ka maikaelelo a go gakolola, go rutuntsha le go tsibosa setshaba ka bolwetse jwa HIV/AIDS.
